# INRelevantShortcutRole.information

**Case**

An informational-based relevant shortcut.

## Declaration

```swift
case information
```

## Discussion

Specify this role for relevant shortcuts that represent information that the user may want to glance at, such as the current weather conditions.

## Roles

- **INRelevantShortcutRole.action**: An action-based relevant shortcut.
title: INRelevantShortcutRole.information
